metadata.title: DamXer processed forecasting benchmark
metadata.description: Site-anonymized processed inputs, filtered structural-response targets, and original observation masks used by the frozen DamXer forecasting protocol. This release is a processed forecasting benchmark and does not contain the complete source monitoring archive.
metadata.access_conditions: Files are available to editors and peer reviewers through a private review link during peer review. Public release is planned after manuscript acceptance, subject to the documented data-owner approval.
